title: Tobias Sterbak - GitHub
text:
GitHub Profile: Tobias Sterbak (tsterbak)
Bio: Data Scientist, Mathematician, Machine Learning Engineer, Open Source developer
Location: Berlin, Germany
Top Languages: Python, Jupyter Notebook

Top Projects:
- openandroidinstaller-dev/openandroidinstaller (512 stars, Python): Makes installing alternative Android distributions nice and easy.
- promptmage (115 stars, Python): simplifies the process of creating and managing LLM workflows.
- biaslyze-dev/biaslyze (39 stars, Jupyter Notebook): The NLP Bias Identification Toolkit
- pydataberlin-2019 (39 stars, Jupyter Notebook): This Repository contains the material for my tutorial "Managing the end-to-end machine learning lifecycle with MLFlow" at pyData/pyCon Berlin 2019.
- pydataberlin-2022 (22 stars, Jupyter Notebook): This Repository contains the material for the tutorial "Introduction to MLOps with MLflow" held at pyData/pyCon Berlin 2022.
- keras_attention (29 stars, Python): Contains an implementation of the attention mechanism and a keras text classifier wrapper.
- keras_tta (22 stars, Python): Simple test time augmentation (TTA) for keras python library.
- kernel_eca (13 stars, Python): Scikit-learn compatible Kernel Entropy Component Analysis in Python
summary_hint: Data Scientist, Mathematician, Machine Learning Engineer, Open Source developer
